title: 60 Pack Reusable Ziplock Freezer Bags, Food Storage Bags 3 Sizes (6L, 2.45L, 1.55L) with Expandable Bottom zip lock bags for Sandwich,Fruits, Meats, Vegetables, Snacks, and Essentials
features: Strong seal to keep food fresh：This food ziplock bags is made of high-quality PE material with a zip design, offering excellent waterproof and moisture-proof properties. It effectively blocks moisture, dust, and odors, extending the freshness of food. Ideal for storing dry goods, frozen food, and leftovers, preventing food from spoiling.

Multiple size options: You will receive 60 food storage freezer bags in three sizes (small, medium, and large). The set includes 25 large bags (28.5x32x7CM/6L), 20 medium bags (22.5x23x6CM/2.45L), and 15 small bags (20.5x18x6CM/1.55L), for a total of 60 bags (3 boxes). With ample quantity and various sizes, these bags are perfect for storing a wide range of ingredients, from vegetables and fruits to snacks and dry goods, offering flexibility and practicality.

Easy to clean and reusable: These freezer bags ziplock feature a zip-lock seal design, making them easy to open and close for convenience. Simply rinse with water to clean. They are reusable, saving costs while reducing plastic waste, making them an eco-friendly and economical choice.

Eco-friendly, non-toxic materials: All ziplock storage bags are made from food-grade PE material, ensuring food safety. They can be safely stored in the freezer at temperatures as low as -30°C, allowing you to use them with confidence and protect your family's health.

Versatile use: The reusable Zip lock bags in three different sizes are perfect for storing a variety of foods such as fruits, vegetables, sandwiches, nuts, and meats to keep them fresh. Additionally, while traveling, you can use the zip bags to store toiletries, cosmetics, small clothes, and more. They are waterproof, moisture-proof, and transparent, making them highly practical.
description: Product Description Reliable Material： All ziplock bags are made from food-grade materials that are BPA-free and PVC-free, ensuring safety and health for you and your family. Enjoy peace of mind knowing the bags are free from harmful chemicals. Strong Seal to Keep Food Fresh: Made from high-quality PE material and featuring a secure zipper design, these storage bags effectively seal the bag opening, preventing air from entering and extending the freshness of your food while preserving its taste. Multiple Size Options to Meet All Your Needs: Available in various sizes (small, medium, large), these bags are perfect for storing different types of food, from fruits and vegetables to snacks and dry goods. Flexible and versatile for any storage requirement. Multiple size options： S x 15pcs: 20.5x18x6cm M x 20pcs: 22.5x23x6cm L x 25pcs: 28.5x32x7cm Available in various sizes (1.55L, 2.45L, 6L), these bags are perfect for storing different types of food, Flexible and versatile for any storage requirement. Enhance three-dimensionality and capacity The widened bottom design allows the storage bag to stand upright, offering more space than traditional flat-bottom bags. This optimizes space utilization, especially in the fridge, making it easier to organize items and prevent food from being crushed or damaged. Airtight and durable, this seal locks in freshness, preserving flavor and preventing leaks. Perfect for storing food securely. The reusable ziplock bag’s widened bottom increases capacity and allows it to stand upright, keeping fridge storage neat. This food storage bag adopts a zip lock sealing design, which is easy to open and seal, making it more convenient to operate and use. The zipper design allows easy use, and the bags can be rinsed clean for reuse, saving money and reducing plastic waste. It is your best choice.
